name: Chrono Pendulum "Wings"
descriptionTemplate: Max Arithmetica +2. After playing "Strike" or "Defense," the corresponding Awakener gains 5 Aliemus. After releasing Exalt, gain 1 "Strike" of the corresponding Awakener with {Exhaust} and {Fleeting} attached. After releasing Posse, randomly gain a "Defense" with {Exhaust} and {Fleeting}.
